office_address: 47 Harvest Gold Manor NE, Calgary, Alberta, T3K 4R3
emergency_definition: Complete power loss at a commercial property
Gas station pump electrical failures (Dave Thompson's properties)

emergency_routing_rules.fallback_action: Take detailed message and text both Ben and Cole. Assure caller it is flagged as urgent.

non_emergency_routing_rules.action: Take message with name, number, and description of need. Inform caller someone will call back next business day.
non_emergency_routing_rules.route_to: Ben (owner) — callbacks only, no live transfer for general callers
non_emergency_routing_rules.message: During business hours: Clara takes info, Ben calls back. After hours: take message, next business day callback.

call_transfer_rules.failure_message: I'm sorry, I wasn't able to reach Ben directly. Let me take your information and I'll make sure he calls you back as soon as possible.
call_transfer_rules.failure_action: Collect caller details (name, number, description) and create follow-up notification

integration_constraints: Uses Jobber as CRM — direct integration not yet available
Jobber handles scheduling, invoicing, and customer records
Manual entry from Clara dashboard to Jobber required until integration is live
Operations manager Cole handles data entry from dashboard to Jobber
after_hours_flow_summary: Clara answers and informs caller office is closed. Business hours Mon-Fri 7:30 AM - 4:30 PM MT. Non-emergency: take message, next business day callback. Emergency: try Ben first (30s), then Cole (30s), then take detailed message and text both. Assure caller of urgent follow-up.
office_hours_flow_summary: Clara answers all incoming calls. Greet caller, identify needs, collect name and number. Whitelisted contacts (Shelley Manley 403-870-8494, Dave Thompson 403-612-7789, Amanda 403-555-0142, Cole 403-555-0198) bypass Clara and ring through directly to Ben. All others: Clara takes message, Ben calls back.
questions_or_unknowns: Does Ben want Saturday availability for whitelisted contacts beyond the current bypass setup?
Exact response time commitment for emergency callbacks (mentioned 30 minutes — is this a promise or estimate?)
Solar panel referral — should Clara recommend a specific company or just say 'we don't offer that'?
notes: Ben is a sole proprietor with 30 years of electrical experience, running his own business for 8 years. Currently has 3 journeymen, 1 apprentice, and uses subcontractors for overflow. Operations manager Cole handles data entry. Previously tried a virtual assistant (real person) and a business phone system, both unsuccessfully. Uses Jobber CRM. Gets 20-50 calls/week. Service area: Greater Calgary — Airdrie (north), Okotoks (south), Cochrane (west). Does NOT do: gemstone lights, solar panels. Style: professional but friendly and casual. Signed up for starter plan ($249/mo, 500 min, 3-month trial).
